name: Herbed Vegetable Toss
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Olive oil or margarine, melted
recipeInstructions:
1. Bias-slice the potatoes into 1-inch pieces (about 2 cups).
2. Place a steamer basket in a large saucepan. Add water to just below the basket. Bring the water to boiling.
3. Peel a strip around the center of each potato. Add the potatoes and carrots to the steamer basket. Cover and steam for 20-25 minutes or until the vegetables are tender.
4. Remove the veggies from the steamer and place them in a serving bowl. Sprinkle with oil, melted margarine, and rosemary or thyme. Toss lightly to coat.
